system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi, this is Yusuf Rossi. I just received my order—#W2378156—and I’d like to request an exchange for a couple of items. 

First, the mechanical keyboard I got isn’t quite what I wanted. I’d like to exchange it for the same model, but with clicky switches instead. If you have a clicky version that’s also full size and has RGB backlighting, that would be perfect. If not, I’m okay with a clicky, full-size keyboard even if it doesn’t have backlighting.

Second, I ordered a smart thermostat, but the one I received is only compatible with Apple HomeKit. I need one that works with Google Home instead. 

Can you help me with both exchanges? I want to make sure everything is handled in one go. Let me know if you need any more details from my end.

Thank you, Yusuf. Before I can assist with your exchange request, I need to verify your identity for security purposes. Could you please provide either:

- The email address associated with your account,  
or  
- Your zip code?

Once verified, I’ll review your order and help you with the exchanges for both the mechanical keyboard and the smart thermostat.
Sure, my zip code is 19122. Let me know if you need anything else to verify my account.
Thank you, Yusuf. For verification, I also need your first and last name as registered on your account. Could you please confirm your full name as it appears on your account?
Yes, my full name is Yusuf Rossi, just as it’s registered on my account. Let me know if you need any other details.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for confirming your name and zip code. There was a technical issue verifying your account. Could you please provide the email address associated with your account? This will help me proceed with your request quickly.

I’m sorry, but I actually don’t remember which email address I used for this order. Is there any other way I can verify my identity? I have my order number (#W2378156), my shipping address, and any other details you might need. Let me know what else I can provide so we can move forward with the exchange.

Thank you for your understanding, Yusuf. For security reasons, I need to verify your identity using either your email address or your full name and zip code. Since you’ve already provided your name and zip code, let’s try again:

Just to confirm, is your zip code 19122 and your full name Yusuf Rossi? If so, I’ll attempt to verify your account once more. If there’s any variation in the spelling or zip code, please let me know.

Once verified, I’ll proceed to review your order and assist with your exchange request.

Yes, that’s correct—my full name is Yusuf Rossi and my zip code is 19122. Please go ahead and try to verify my account again. If you need any other information, just let me know. I’d like to get these exchanges sorted out as soon as possible. Thank you!
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm sorry, Yusuf, but I am currently unable to verify your identity using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. Without verification, I am unable to access your order details or process exchanges for security reasons.

If you are able to locate your email address at any point, please provide it so I can assist you further. Otherwise, I recommend contacting our support team directly, as they may have alternative ways to verify your identity.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for further assistance?
Yes, please transfer me to a human agent. I’d like to get this resolved as soon as possible, and I’m happy to provide any additional information they might need. Thank you for your help so far.

arguments.summary: User Yusuf Rossi (zip code 19122) wants to exchange two items from delivered order #W2378156: a mechanical keyboard (for a clicky, full-size, RGB model if available) and a smart thermostat (needs Google Home compatibility instead of Apple HomeKit). User cannot recall the email address and cannot be verified via name+zip due to technical issues. Please assist with alternative verification and process the exchange.

I apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience. If you’re able to locate your email address later, please return here and I’ll be happy to assist you further.

Thank you for letting me know. I’ll reach out to your support team directly by phone or live chat to get this sorted out. I appreciate your help and patience. If I find my email address, I’ll come back here. Thanks again.

You're very welcome, Yusuf. Thank you for your understanding and patience. If you find your email address or need further assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out here. I hope your exchange is resolved quickly with our support team.

Have a great day!
Thank you! I appreciate your help and understanding. I’ll follow up with the support team and hopefully get everything sorted soon. Have a great day as well!
You're most welcome, Yusuf! If you need any further assistance in the future, feel free to reach out. Wishing you a smooth resolution with your exchange and a wonderful day ahead!
Thank you so much! I appreciate your support and kind words. Have a great day!
